paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently at 6.32, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and 20.9% over the last 21 sessions. The company has seen 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both published on July 23, 2026. These articles discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus, and the admission of shares of Common Stock, respectively.

There have been 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K filing on July 23, 2026, announcing the appointment of four new officers, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
